channel.title: Blog posts got redirected to wordpress
channel.description:
Hi all.
I just got started with Frontity, and I've cloned the theme from @awsmin/f1. I'm not sure what did I change, but now the blog posts will be redirected back to my WordPress site instead of launching in my new frontity site.
Any advice will be greatly appreciated, thanks!

item.title: Blog posts got redirected to wordpress
item.dc:creator: angxze
item.description:
Hey!! So sorry, it’s been a long time since I work on this!

Anyway, this is my repo: GitHub - aaronangxz/React-frontity: aaronangxz.com. Built with Reactjs, Frontity, Wordpress. , appreciate it if you can have a look

Read full topic
item.source: Blog posts got redirected to wordpress

item.title: Blog posts got redirected to wordpress
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @angxze

Welcome to the Community!

Can you please provide a repo or code-sandbox with your code? This is especially helpful to find solutions of technical issues with specific code

Read full topic
item.source: Blog posts got redirected to wordpress

item.description:
Hi all.

I just got started with Frontity, and I’ve cloned the theme from @awsmin/f1. I’m not sure what did I change, but now the blog posts will be redirected back to my WordPress site instead of launching in my new frontity site.
